associateProduct.name: Colorful LED Clock Lamp with Wireless Charging Bluetooth Speake

sellingList.light: Create an immersive atmosphere with our RGB 3D Ambient Light. Mesmerizing lighting effects and 18 modes transform any space.
Customize your lighting experience with our dual-sided illumination device. Versatile RGB full-color lighting and APP control enhance any space

reviewsList.name: TM
reviewsList.comment: These light bars are super easy to install and can display a wide variety of colors. I like placing them in our living room. Convenient and cheerful!

reviewsList.name: sen
reviewsList.comment: The response speed is fast and the rhythm is fast. What surprised me the most is that it actually has lights on both sides.

reviewsList.name: JM
reviewsList.comment: Good, very good, very atmospheric, nice

reviewsList.name: Albert
reviewsList.comment: It looks like I'll be living with it for a long time now, so cool

reviewsList.name: Gabriel Garcia
reviewsList.comment: Recommended by a friend, it's very good. This one is much better than the one I picked on Amazon. It's very good, and it's cheap, cost-effective, powerful, and won't break the rhythm.

reviewsList.name: Luna Wang
reviewsList.comment: Very easy to assemble and control, and it also comes with a remote control. I use it as a bedside sleep light.

reviewsList.name: coco
reviewsList.comment: The response speed is fast and the rhythm is fast. What surprised me the most is that it actually has lights on both sides.

reviewsList.name: Seun Ojo
reviewsList.comment: It’s so cool. I chose this ambient light from several stores before I fell in love with it. It’s really good.

reviewsList.name: Isaac Alvarez
reviewsList.comment: I love these lights so much! I'm so happy I saw this on sale and decided to get them. They're very bright. Have a lot of modes as stated and it has its own app with it's easy to scan QR code. I would suggest this for any gamer or anyone that just likes to have a very vibey room

reviewsList.name: PetMaLu.
reviewsList.comment: This look awesome next to the computer monitor.. you won’t need a ring light if you have this.. and it’s great for the price..

reviewsList.name: Liechserbeth
reviewsList.comment:
Están demasiado geniales y sin duda superó mis expectativas.
Cuenta con luces sincronizadas para el despertador, temporizador para encender o apagar y un sin fin de modos y entre ellos para que parpadeen con la música que está a su alrededor. Flipe con estas luces y el precio vale cada centavo!!

reviewsList.name: Karaline Mckinney
reviewsList.comment: Bright lights and gives great atmosphere!

reviewsList.name: SunnyTommy
reviewsList.comment:
When playing games or watching movies, I really love the quality of this product. It is easy to install, has excellent rhythmic effect, and has many choices of color modes. Even if there is no need for any atmosphere, it can also be used as a desk lamp for daily lighting. In a word, I like this product very much.

I like to have the light bars facing the wall, and the light reflected through the wall will make my room cool and colorful instead of boring. Besides, the operation is very simple. I like the remote control operation, even though the Bluetooth operation can choose more modes, but so far, the function selection of the remote control can achieve the colorful effect I want.

reviewsList.name: CO Diver
reviewsList.comment: The light is pretty good coming with the remote control as well as the app support, honest I haven’t even dug into the app yet but the presets on the remote were pretty fun already. I placed those facing up in one of my IKEA shelf slot, with an action figure it creates a really cool little environment on its own. Very happy with it so far.

reviewsList.name: Leo
reviewsList.comment: The installation of these light bars is very convenient, and almost no tools are needed. I put them on both sides of the TV and the effect is very good. Of course, they can also be placed on the back of my computer, which should be very cool when playing games.

reviewsList.name: Savatrie Narayan
reviewsList.comment: Really happy to buy this color-changing ambient light, there are pure light, rainbow light. Make the room very ambient

reviewsList.name: Gabriel Garcia
reviewsList.comment: Realistically these LED Lights were one of the best purchases I've made this whole quarantine ! I decided to revamp my office/gaming room and these did just the trick, not only fixing up the darkness the only one lightbulb emitted, but making my whole work/game room an amazing hang out place! The amount of settings these LED Lights is amazing! From Flickers to Fade to even a array of multiple colors to choose from. I though these would require you to glue them on but the adhesive on the LED Lights were truly a amazing addition, they stick so well and I don't see them unsticking any time soon! I love the LED lights if your ever in the need these would do you good from brightness to colors arrangements and even having a new vibe to your whole room decor! If anyone is in the need I highly recommend these for a friend moving into a new house or even trying to revamp their existing space, the work amazing, brightness is amazing and the options you get to choose from is like no other ! Highly Recommend!
